channel.title: NVO987 Research Infrastructure
channel.description: Decentralized research infrastructure combining identity verification, knowledge graph systems, research publication nodes and machine-readable data services across Web2 and Web3 environments.

item.title: NVO987 Infrastructure Overview
item.description: Overview of the NVO987 decentralized research infrastructure, including identity verification systems, knowledge domains, and distributed publication nodes.

item.title: Decentralized Identity Architecture
item.description: Documentation of the decentralized identity architecture used within the NVO987 research infrastructure.

item.title: NVO987 Knowledge Domain
item.description: Research documentation and analytical publications within the knowledge domain of the NVO987 infrastructure.
